design_philosophy: SDE-first with GenAI as a strong secondary. The aesthetic commands attention through engineering rigor and modern AI sensibility. It uses technical minimalism, high contrast, and asymmetrical editorial layouts. Avoids all generic AI clichés (no purple/teal gradients). Built as a pure static React site for GitHub pages.

mono_labels.classes: font-mono tracking-[0.1em] uppercase text-xs sm:text-sm text-accent

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Asymmetrical layout. Use the 'Grid Borders (Technical Look)' for the Skills section to expose the skeleton. Use 'Bento Grid' for the Projects section to create visual tension.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strictly left-aligned for hero and dense content. No centered equal-spacing layouts.

surface_strategies.cards: Flat solid surfaces (#121212). Sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). 1px solid border (#2A2A2A). On hover: border-accent, slightly lift (-translate-y-1).
surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass variant: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/80, 1px bottom border border-border.
surface_strategies.monogram_avatar: Sharp, geometric box (e.g., 64x64 or 80x80) with a 1px accent border, containing the letters 'KV' in JetBrains Mono, text-accent.

components_instructions.buttons: Primary: Solid accent background with dark text, sharp edges. Secondary: Transparent with 1px border (#2A2A2A) and text_primary, hover changes border to accent.
components_instructions.navigation: Sticky top nav. Must include Brand ('KV' or 'Krishna Vamsi') on left, links (About, Experience, Projects, Skills) in middle, and 'Resume' CTA on right. Visible on desktop.
components_instructions.skills_columns: Two starkly contrasting columns: 'SDE Stack' vs 'GenAI Stack'. Use a visible grid/table-like structure with 1px borders dividing the items. Technical and raw.
components_instructions.project_cards: Bento style. Title in Outfit, tech stack as JetBrains Mono tags. Minimalist, text-forward. No dummy placeholder images. If no image, use typographic layout.
components_instructions.icons: Use lucide-react with thin stroke widths (1.5px) to maintain the technical, high-end feel.

images.description: Dark structural architecture. Use as a very low opacity (10-15%) overlay behind the hero section to give it an engineering structure.
images.usage: bg-cover bg-center opacity-10 absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none mix-blend-overlay

images.description: Dark abstract network grid. Good for GenAI project cards or the GenAI skills section background at very low opacity.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling via custom hook or standard CSS scroll-behavior: smooth.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Subtle fade-in and slide-up (y: 20 -> 0) on scroll. Staggered entrance for skill lists and project cards. No bouncy or playful animations. Keep it precise, linear, and fast.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text_secondary (#8A8A8A) passes WCAG AA against background (#050505).
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (nav links, buttons, project links, contact links) MUST include data-testid. Example: data-testid='nav-resume-button'.

hero.name: Krishna Vamsi Gangisetty
hero.tagline: Software Engineer building scalable systems & shipping GenAI features.

about.summary: 3+ years of experience as an SDE, currently at Amdocs. Expanding engineering rigor into the domain of GenAI and Agentic AI.

experience.details: Telecom platforms for Comcast/AT&T. Java, Spring Boot, Kafka, K8s + AskMiPaaS Agentic AI platform.
